description: Microsoft Word 2010 is open with 'DR_Plan_Draft.docx', a Business Continuity Plan containing inconsistent terminology. Standardize the document by replacing all instances of 'disaster recovery' (case-insensitive) with 'Disaster Recovery' (Title Case), all standalone instances of 'BCP' with 'Business Continuity Plan', all double spaces with single spaces, 'e-mail' with 'email', and 'back-up' with 'backup'. Save the corrected document as 'DR_Plan_Final.docx' in the Documents folder.
